zh.lifeSummary: 當Niccolò Doria於大約1210年出生在義大利利古里亞吉諾瓦吉諾瓦時，他的父親Emmanuele DORIA31歲，母親Iurgia 'Giorgia' de Lacon-Gunale22歲。他於大約1231年與Preziosa di Torres結婚。他們至少是8個兒子的父母。他去世於1276年1月18日在義大利利古里亞吉諾瓦享年67歲，埋葬在義大利利古里亞吉諾瓦波托分諾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Niccolò Doria于大约1210年出生在意大利利古里亞吉諾瓦吉諾瓦时，他的父亲Emmanuele DORIA31岁，母亲Iurgia 'Giorgia' de Lacon-Gunale22岁。他于大约1231年与Preziosa di Torres结婚。他们至少是8个儿子的父母。他去世于1276年1月18日在意大利利古里亞吉諾瓦享年67岁，埋葬在意大利利古里亞吉諾瓦波托分諾。

nameMeanings.name: Doria
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: metronymic from the female personal name Oria, from Latin Aurea, Auria ‘golden’.
habitational name for someone from a place called Oria, of which there are many examples.

nameMeanings.name: Niccolò
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

en.lifeSummary: When Niccolò Doria was born about 1210, in Genoa, Genova, Liguria, Italy, his father, Emmanuele DORIA, was 31 and his mother, Iurgia 'Giorgia' de Lacon-Gunale, was 22. He married Preziosa di Torres about 1231. They were the parents of at least 8 sons. He died on 18 January 1276, in Genova, Liguria, Italy, at the age of 67, and was buried in Portofino, Genova, Liguria, Italy.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Niccolò Doria est né environ 1210, à Genès, Genova, Liguria, Italie, son père, Emmanuele DORIA, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Iurgia 'Giorgia' de Lacon-Gunale, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Preziosa di Torres environ 1231. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils. Il est décédé le 18 janvier 1276, à Genova, Liguria, Italie, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Portofino, Genova, Liguria, Italie.

de.lifeSummary: Als Niccolò Doria um 1210 in Genua, Genova, Liguria, Italien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Emmanuele DORIA 31 und seine Mutter Iurgia 'Giorgia' de Lacon-Gunale 22. Er hat um 1231 Preziosa di Torres geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne. Er starb am 18. Januar 1276 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Genova, Liguria, Italien und wurde in Portofino, Genova, Liguria, Italien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Niccolò Doria è nato il circa 1210 nel Genova, Genova, Liguria, Italia, il suo padre, Emmanuele DORIA, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Iurgia 'Giorgia' de Lacon-Gunale, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Preziosa di Torres circa 1231. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli. Morì il 18 gennaio 1276, nel Genova, Liguria, Italia, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolto a Portofino, Genova, Liguria, Italia.

ja.lifeSummary: Niccolò Doriaが約1210年にイタリアリグリアジェノヴァジェノヴァで生まれた時，父Emmanuele DORIAは31歳，母Iurgia 'Giorgia' de Lacon-Gunaleは22歳であった。約1231年にPreziosa di Torresと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子の親であった。彼は1276年1月18日にイタリアリグリアジェノヴァで67歳で死去し，イタリアリグリアジェノヴァポルトフィノにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Niccolò Doria(이)가 대략 1210년 이탈리아 리구리아 노바 노바에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Emmanuele DORIA(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Iurgia 'Giorgia' de Lacon-Gunale(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1231년 Preziosa di Torres(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1276년 1월 18일 이탈리아 리구리아 노바에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 이탈리아 리구리아 노바 포토핀오에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Niccolò Doria nasceu aproximadamente 1210, em Genova, Genova, Liguria, Itália, seu pai, Emmanuele DORIA, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Iurgia 'Giorgia' de Lacon-Gunale, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Preziosa di Torres aproximadamente 1231. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos. Ele faleceu em 18 de janeiro de 1276, em Genova, Liguria, Itália, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em Portofino, Genova, Liguria, Itália.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Niccolò Doria родился около 1210 г. в местности дженова, дженова, лигуря, Италия, его отцу по имени Emmanuele DORIA было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Iurgia 'Giorgia' de Lacon-Gunale, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Preziosa di Torres около 1231 г. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей. Он умер 18 января 1276 г. в местности дженова, лигуря, Италия в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности портофино, дженова, лигуря, Италия.

sm.de 1220 a 1230: mai le 1220 e o'o I le 1230

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Niccolò Doria nació aproximadamente 1210, en Genova, Genova, Liguria, Italia, su papá, Emmanuele DORIA, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Iurgia 'Giorgia' de Lacon-Gunale, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Preziosa di Torres aproximadamente 1231. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos. Murió el 18 de enero de 1276, en Genova, Liguria, Italia, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultado en Portofino, Genova, Liguria, Italia.
